meta.title: Assessing The Cyber Readiness Of A State (Florida)
meta.description:
The Florida Center for Cybersecurity was tasked with assessing the cyber readiness of the critical infrastructure in America’s third most populated state made up of over 21 million residents spread across 53,633 square miles. 

This session provides an update on the nationally aligned multi-assessment platform, findings from the assessment, and data-driven recommendations for improving cyber-readiness. 

Subscribe to Dale’s ICS Security: Friday News & Notes email here:
https://friday.dale-peterson.com/signup
Check out S4x26. Feb 23 - 26 in Miami South Beach:
https://s4xevents.com
